use_cases: Filtering and selecting task categories in productivity applications
Navigating between different event types in calendar interfaces
Switching between reminder categories in scheduling apps
Selecting meeting or appointment types in collaboration tools
Organizing celebration or event filters in social applications
ai_summary: A filterable list item component with smooth spring-based entrance animations and icon support. Features staggered animation delays based on item index, selection state management, and click-to-select behavior. Uses Hugeicons for clean visual representation and supports multiple filter categories like tasks, events, reminders, appointments, meetings, and celebrations.
